mapper.select: SELECT * FROM eval_task WHERE status = 1 AND (start_time IS NULL OR start_time <= NOW()) AND (end_time IS NULL OR end_time >= NOW()) ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO eval_task (task_name, course_id, term, start_time, end_time, status, creator_id, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{taskName}, #{courseId}, #{term}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{status}, #{creatorId}, NOW(), NOW())
